name: check_dependency_vulnerabilities
description:
Check a list of dependencies for known vulnerabilities using the GitHub Security Advisory Database.
This tool queries the GitHub Advisory Database to find known security vulnerabilities affecting the specified packages.

Use this tool when:
- You want to check if project dependencies have known vulnerabilities
- You are adding a new dependency to a project and should check it is safe before adding to the project

The tool accepts owner, repo, and a list of dependencies with their ecosystems and versions, then returns any matching security advisories with upgrade recommendations where available.

dependencies.description: List of dependencies to check for vulnerabilities
